title: Analyze and plan lichen-hal extension for SX1302/SX1250 concentrator (reset/SPI/IRQ/GPS-PPS)
description: Analyze rust/lora-phy, lichen-hal, lichen-gateway, any SX1302/SX1250, SPI, IRQ, concentrator, packet_forwarder code. List relevant files, current status, what to add for HAL (reset, SPI, IRQ, GPS PPS). Suggest idiomatic no_std driver structure matching existing lora-phy (traits for Radio, Config). Identify test vectors or interop needs. Plan minimal changes for this bead (HAL only, no full forwarder). Flag memory/RTOS constraints for gateway. Scope: HAL traits only. See query for details. Acceptance: comprehensive report with file list, trait sketch, bead plan.
